next_action: Approved. Proceed with commit/merge per CommitGate flow.

observations.detail: Reviewed staged diff only. Resume now passes `-c sandbox_mode="read-only"` while exec remains on existing `--sandbox read-only`; if Codex rejects the config override later, the runner path remains fail-closed by throwing.
The unit test now fixes the intended resume argv shape and preserves the negative assertion that `--sandbox` is not used on resume.
